channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: John Lennon and Yoko Ono’s “Power to the People” Concerts Coming to Theaters This Spring
item.description: 🌟 Groovy news alert! 🎶 Join John Lennon and Yoko Ono for a rockin' movie night this spring! 🎸🎥 #PowerToThePeople

item.title: Bruce Springsteen Leads Massive Shane MacGowan Tribute LP
item.description: 🎸🔥 The Boss joins forces on epic tribute to Shane MacGowan! Legends unite for a rock 'n' roll celebration! #MusicNews #RockLegends 🤘🎶

item.title: Gipsy Kings Have Sold 25 Million Albums Since Leaving the Streets of Southern France, and a New Era Is Just Beginning
item.description: 🎉 From the streets to superstardom! Gipsy Kings hit 25 million album sales and show no signs of slowing down! 🌟 #GipsyKings #MusicLegends

item.title: The Pussycat Dolls Announce Massive 2026 Reunion Tour, Reveal “Club Song”: Stream
item.description: 🎉 The Pussycat Dolls are back with a bang! 🙌🎶 Dive into nostalgia and dance with their hot new club anthem! 💃🔥 #PussycatDollsReunion

item.title: Harry Styles Covers Tears for Fears’ Classic “Everybody Wants to Rule the World” on BBC 1 Live Lounge: Watch
item.description: Harry Styles giving us all the feels with this epic cover! 🎤🌍 #HarryStyles #LiveLounge #TearsforFears
